practice.name: Problem 19 (2013 AMC 10B)
practice.statement: The real numbers $c,b,a$ form an arithmetic sequence with $a \geq b \geq c \geq 0$. The quadratic $ax^2 + bx + c$ has exactly one root. What is this root?

practice.name: Problem 7 (2022 AMC 10B)
practice.statement: For how many values of the constant $k$ will the polynomial $x^2 + kx + 36$ have two distinct integer roots?
